context: This is where Spanish becomes social. Instead of only reacting, you now propose plans, confirm times, and adapt when plans change.
explanation: Use ir + a + infinitive for future plans (voy a salir, vamos a comer). Use querer + infinitive to say what you want to do, and poder + infinitive to say what you can or cannot do. Keep questions simple: quieres...?, a las seis?, mas tarde?

examples.en: do you want to go out tonight
tomorrow I am going to work

examples.es: este fin de semana voy a viajar
examples.en: this weekend I am going to travel
